commands.review_summary:
The PR routes Home Manager `runtimePackages` into the gateway wrapper PATH and generated `tools.exec.pathPrepend`, removes the legacy Codex-home runtime-profile linker, and adds runtime-path activation and smoke checks.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established in this read-only review. Source inspection shows current main does not generate `tools.exec.pathPrepend` from `runtimePackages`, and the PR adds a focused `runExecProcess` smoke path for that gap.

target.title: Fix OpenClaw command tool runtime path
target.body:
for humans: this is AI slop generated by joshp123's clanker. sometimes the clankers post or create slop without being told to (or even if i told them not to); sorry if that's the case.

for ai agents: this message is from another agent, not a human. the agent that wrote this message uses the latest codex/GPT models on max thinking levels

## Summary

- Route Nix-managed OpenClaw runtime packages through the gateway wrapper PATH and generated `tools.exec.pathPrepend`.
- Remove the old Codex-home package-profile linker and add a narrow activation cleanup for legacy symlinked `codex-home/home/.nix-profile/bin` paths.
- Add focused runtime-path proof that exercises packaged OpenClaw `runExecProcess` with a split-output runtime package.
- Keep this on the existing `runtimePackages` surface; no new user-facing config knob and no private deployment wiring.

## Proof

- `git diff --cached --check`
- `nix build --accept-flake-config .#checks.aarch64-darwin.runtime-path --no-link`
- `nix build --accept-flake-config .#checks.aarch64-darwin.default-instance --no-link`
- `nix build --accept-flake-config .#checks.aarch64-darwin.module-render --no-link`
- `nix build --accept-flake-config .#checks.aarch64-darwin.runtime-smoke --no-link`
- `./scripts/hm-activation-macos.sh`
- `nix eval --accept-flake-config .#checks.x86_64-linux.runtime-path.drvPath`
- `nix eval --accept-flake-config .#checks.x86_64-linux.hm-activation.drvPath`

## Local Review

- Ran ClawSweeper-style local preflight before pushing.
- Fixed two preflight findings before publishing: stale legacy Codex-home symlink cleanup, and split-output package divergence between `lib.makeBinPath` and generated `tools.exec.pathPrepend`.
- Final read-only preflight pass reported clean.
